programme.title: ATP Finals: Turin Final
programme.desc: World number one Carlos Alcaraz faces Italy's reigning ATP Finals champion Jannik Sinner in their sixth meeting of the year, marking the finale to the 2025 Tour season in Turin. (16.

programme.title: WTA Final: Madrid
programme.desc: In a repeat of the 2023 US Open final, two-time Madrid champion Aryna Sabalenka eyes another marquee title against Coco Gauff, who won their only prior clay-court meeting. (03.

programme.title: ATP Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Britain's Jack Draper competes in his maiden ATP Masters 1000 final at Indian Wells as the top-10 bound Brit faces Holger Rune. Draper knocked out Carlos Alcaraz in the last four. (16.

programme.title: WTA Final: Rome
programme.desc: A women's singles champion is crowned at the Italian Open, as home favourite and world number five Jasmine Paolini faces the American Coco Gauff. (17.

programme.title: Vinci v Serena 2015
programme.desc: After winning the first three majors of the year, Serena Williams' pursuit of the Calendar Grand Slam ran into an unseeded Roberta Vinci in the semi-final of the 2015 US Open.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Clinching the fifth of her eight Miami Open titles, Serena Williams would have to overcome one of her great rivals Justine Henin as the pair met in a highly anticipated 2007 final.

programme.title: WTA Final: Dubai
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: A rivalry renewed on the Caja Magica clay, world number one Aryna Sabalenka and four-time Grand Slam winner Naomi Osaka go toe to toe for a third time at the Madrid Open. (27.

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: The wild-card pairing of Katie Boulter and a 45-year-old Venus Williams close in on a quarter-final appearance in Madrid as the unlikely duo take on Sofia Kenin and Su-Wei Hsieh. (27.

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Madrid
programme.desc: Britain's Cam Norrie faces world number one Jannik Sinner and defending champion Casper Ruud plays Stefanos Tsitsipas. Mirra Andreeva meets Leylah Fernandez as Rafael Jodar's run continues.

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Madrid
programme.desc: Reigning Madrid champion Aryna Sabalenka meets Hailey Baptiste once again in the last eight of a WTA 1000 event. Two-time winner Alexander Zverev plays 20-year-old Czech star Jakub Mensik.

programme.title: ATP Monte Carlo 2026 Review
programme.desc: An in-depth review of all the action from the 2026 Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters, an ATP Masters 1000 clay-court event held in the Principality of Monaco.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Saving four match points in the process, Roger Federer was pushed to the limit in his 2014 ATP Finals semi-final meeting with fellow Swiss superstar Stan Wawrinka.

programme.title: Serena v Azarenka 2013
programme.desc: In what was Serena Williams' fifth US Open victory and 17th Grand Slam title overall, the home favourite met Victoria Azarenka once more - the same player she beat the year previous.

programme.title: ATP Final: Miami
programme.desc: Chasing a record seventh men's Miami crown, Novak Djokovic - now the oldest ATP Masters 1000 finalist - takes on Jakub Mensik, aiming to win his first tour-level trophy. (30.

programme.title: WTA Final: Montreal
programme.desc: Rising Canadian star Victoria Mboko's miracle Montreal run continues as the 18-year-old meets four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka in her first tour-level final. (07.
